title_cn: 泛欧合作坦克
summary: Having just buried the long-suffering FCAS next-generation fighter program, Germany and France are set to take equal stakes in KNDS to produce their future tanks. That could be just what Europe needs as tensions rise with the US.

title_cn: 早期 Anthropic 资助者 Menlo 获得 30 亿美元有史以来最大一笔融资

title_cn: 谈论运输：AIT 探讨货运代理的下一阶段
summary: Global supply chains remain under pressure from geopolitical disruptions, tight airfreight capacity and shifting sourcing strategies. In this episode of the Talking Transports podcast, AIT Worldwide Logistics Chairman and CEO Vaughn Moore joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Senior Transportation and Logistics Analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss how freight forwarders are helping customers navigate an increasingly complex environment. Moore explains why airfreight markets remain constrained by capacity rat

summary: When Donald Trump Jr. was in India last November for a trip that included a wedding and a wildlife sanctuary tour, he made an unpublicized stop in the bustling city of Ahmedabad in the Western state of Gujarat.

title: Strongest Dollar This Year Pressures EM Currencies and Stocks
title_cn: 今年最强劲的美元给新兴市场货币和股票带来压力
summary: Most developing-world currencies weakened against the dollar on Tuesday as the greenback climbed to its strongest level of the year, amid a risk-off mood triggered by a steep selloff in South Korea’s technology giants.

title: NYC Heads to Polls With Democrats Split Over Age, AI, Israel
title_cn: 纽约市即将举行民意调查，民主党人在年龄、人工智能、以色列问题上存在分歧
summary: New York City is living through the noisiest Congressional primary season in a generation.

title: Porsche Looks to Reduce Complexity by Cutting Models
title_cn: 保时捷希望通过削减车型来降低复杂性
summary: Porsche AG confirmed its profit outlook for the year as it pushes to become leaner to revive margins battered by US tariffs and weak demand in China. David Welch has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Steadies While Tankers Openly Enter Hormuz After Peace Deal
title_cn: 和平协议后油轮公开进入霍尔木兹，油价稳定
summary:
Oil steadied while tankers become more overt in transiting the Strait of Hormuz following an agreement between Iran and the US to end their conflict.
Ellen Fraser, Partner and Energy expert at Baringa Partners, discusses the recent moves in oil as the US greenlights Iran to sell on the open market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greenspan’s Legacy, From Irrational Exuberance to 2008 Crisis
title_cn: 格林斯潘的遗产，从非理性繁荣到 2008 年危机
summary:
Tributes to former Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan poured in after the news of his death early Monday, many from former colleagues and market players who had a front-row seat during his 18-year tenure atop the US central bank.
Bill Dudley, Bloomberg Opinion Columnist and former NY Federal Reserve President, discusses the passing of Greenspan and how his role has influenced the Federal Reserve beyond his time there. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maritime Watchdog to Start Evacuating Stranded Seafarers From Middle East
title_cn: 海事监管机构开始从中东撤离滞留海员
summary: The International Maritime Organization said it will begin to implement an evacuation plan for more than 11,000 seafarers still stranded in the Middle East after the US and Iran agreed to an interim peace deal.

title: Oil Eases While Tankers Openly Enter Hormuz After Peace Deal
title_cn: 和平协议后，油轮公开进入霍尔木兹，石油供应减少
summary: Oil dipped as tankers become more overt in transiting the Strait of Hormuz following an interim agreement between Iran and the US aimed at ending their war and allowing energy shipments to reach global markets.

title: Lula Weighs Replacing Senate Leader Amid Banco Master Fallout
title_cn: 卢拉考虑在银行大师的影响中更换参议院领袖
summary: President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva sees Senator Jaques Wagner as a growing liability to his reelection campaign after a police investigation drew his longtime ally into Brazil’s biggest banking fraud probe, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: Israel Weighs US IPO for Multi-Billion-Dollar Defense Companies
title_cn: 以色列考虑让价值数十亿美元的国防公司在美国首次公开募股
summary: Israel is considering listing state-owned defense giants Israel Aerospace Industries Ltd. and Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Ltd. in the US to potentially avoid stricter disclosure obligations in the local market.

title: EU Sees 6 Billion Reasons for New Levy on Online Shoppers
title_cn: 欧盟认为有 60 亿个理由对网购者征收新税
summary: Bargain-hunting consumers across the European Union will start feeling the pinch of higher online shopping costs next week when a new levy primarily targeting China comes into force, adding a layer of trade friction between the two economies.

title: SpaceX Slides Amid Tech Selloff; AMC Tumbles on Share Sale | Stock Movers
title_cn: SpaceX 在科技股抛售中下滑； AMC 股价下跌 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager:

- SpaceX (SPCX) is heading towards its fourth day of losses, and is currently above its lowest trading price ($149.34 on its IPO) as it continues to approaching that figure.
- IBM (IBM) shares are climbing on news that the company and OpenAI are bringing AI to cyber defense.
- AMC Entertainment (AMC) shares are lower after the movie theater operator entered into a definitive agreement with institutional investors to sell 95.25 million shares of its common stock for gross proceeds of around $200 million. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: America's Nuclear Buildout Gains Speed
title_cn: 美国核建设加速
summary: Oklo Co-Founder and CEO Jake DeWitte joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how America's nuclear resurgence is accelerating as government support, fuel supply improvements, and private capital unlock new reactor development. He reveals Oklo is targeting power production in roughly two years and argues the AI-driven data center boom is creating a market large enough for both large-scale and advanced modular nuclear reactors to thrive. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Fed Will Rely on Supply Side Indicators, Says Morgan Stanley's Jim Caron
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的吉姆·卡伦表示，沃什美联储将依赖供给侧指标
summary: Jim Caron, CIO of portfolio solutions at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, said that new Fed chair Kevin Warsh is a 'supply side economist' will rely more on supply indicators than 'traditional' demand side economic data.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Vujcic Sees Inflation Remaining Higher for Longer
title_cn: 欧洲央行武伊契奇认为通胀将在更长时间内保持在较高水平
summary: The European Central Bank’s decision to raise interest rates was “robust” considering inflation will stay higher for longer, according to Vice President Boris Vujcic.

title: Massachusetts Court Kills Proposal for Toughest US Rent Control
title_cn: 马萨诸塞州法院驳回美国最严格租金管制的提案
summary: The Massachusetts Supreme Judicial Court struck down a ballot proposal that would have imposed the strictest statewide rent control in the US.

title: Macklem Warns Over-Investment in US Poses Financial Risks
title_cn: 麦克勒姆警告美国过度投资构成金融风险
summary: The Bank of Canada’s top official is warning that over-investment in the US is creating broader correction risks for the global financial system.

title: Stocks Slide as Wall Street Gets AI Wake-Up Call: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能唤醒华尔街，股市下滑：市场总结
summary: Wall Street got a reality check as a bruising selloff in several technology giants fueled concern the artificial-intelligence frenzy that has powered the equity bull market might be overblown.

title: Apollo Faces Rising Redemption Pressure
title_cn: 阿波罗面临不断上升的赎回压力
summary: Apollo is again capping withdrawals from its flagship private credit fund after investors requested redemptions far above the 5% limit. Bloomberg's Silas Brown joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the biggest private credit firms may be the most exposed to retail investor outflows and why the next quarter could reveal whether this is a temporary reaction or a broader industry risk. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: La nueva Fed de Kevin Warsh
title_cn: 凯文·沃什的新美联储
summary: Kevin Warsh superó su primer gran examen al frente de la Reserva Federal. La Fed mantuvo las tasas sin cambios, pero los mercados reforzaron las apuestas a una posible subida en octubre. Mientras tanto, Warsh ya comenzó a introducir cambios dentro del banco central. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Falls on Cooler Outlooks, Smaller LNG Flows
title_cn: 由于前景转冷、液化天然气流量减少，美国天然气价格下跌
summary: US natural gas futures declined as forecasts shifted to show cooler weather in the coming weeks, suggesting a slight decline in demand for gas-fired electricity as consumers pull back on using air-conditioners. US gas flows to liquefied natural gas export facilities also fell, increasing supply in the domestic market.

title: Russia’s Gasoline Crunch Spans Country After Refinery Attacks
title_cn: 炼油厂袭击后俄罗斯全国范围内出现汽油短缺
summary: Russia’s gasoline crunch is worsening, with at least two-thirds of the country’s regions introducing fuel rationing or suffering supply disruptions following relentless Ukrainian drone attacks on refineries.

title: Yen Intervention Prospect Rises After Katayama-Bessent Talks
title_cn: 片山-贝森特会谈后日元干预前景上升
summary: Currency traders are on high alert for intervention after further weakness in the yen and a call between Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama and US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

title: Tesla Holders Bet on SpaceX Merger as Musk’s Real Endgame
title_cn: 特斯拉持有者押注 SpaceX 合并是马斯克的真正结局
summary: It’s been a challenging year for Tesla Inc. shareholders, losing 14% while watching Elon Musk’s SpaceX complete the biggest initial public offering ever and immediately become the most valuable entity in the newly minted trillionaire’s collection.

title: RBI Allows Banks to Lend Against Forex Deposits to Boost Inflows
title_cn: 印度储备银行允许银行以外汇存款为抵押放贷以增加资金流入
summary: India’s central bank allowed lenders to extend loans against foreign-currency deposits raised under its special program aimed at attracting overseas funds, a move that could increase participation in the plan and boost dollar inflows.

title: Iran and Oman Say They’ll Work on Pact for Hormuz Transit Costs
title_cn: 伊朗和阿曼表示将就霍尔木兹过境费用达成协议
summary: Iran and Oman said they’ll begin work on finding an agreement over the future administration of the Strait of Hormuz, including the cost of managing transit, as traders and shipowners fret over the prospect of the introduction of a tolling arrangement.

title: Circle K Owner’s Fuel Profits Soar Despite Weak Demand in Europe
title_cn: 尽管欧洲需求疲软，Circle K 所有者的燃油利润仍大幅上涨
summary: Gas station and convenience store operator Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc. saw big gains in fuel margins after the war in the Middle East caused prices to spike. The company easily beat analysts’ estimates for sales and earnings, propelling shares to a record high.

title: Trump Says US to Control Iran’s Use of Unfrozen Funds
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将控制伊朗使用未冻结资金
summary: President Donald Trump said funds released to Iran from frozen accounts will be “controlled by the U.S.A.” and only to be used to purchase food and medical supplies from the US. Trump made the statement in a post on Truth Social on Tuesday. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Texas Power Trader e360 Alters Course After Shutting Hedge Fund
title_cn: Texas Power Trader e360 在关闭对冲基金后改变路线
summary: e360 Power is pursuing a more conservative trading strategy after a period of poor performance caused the firm that specializes in US natural gas and power markets to close its flagship hedge fund.

title: Tonino Lamborghini Plans Luxury Hotel at South Africa’s Zimbali
title_cn: 托尼诺·兰博基尼计划在南非津巴里建造豪华酒店
summary: Tonino Lamborghini is partnering with Zimbali Lakes Resort to develop a luxury hotel and branded residences near South Africa’s port city of Durban.

title: US Lets Iran Sell Oil Again as Part of Deal to End War
title_cn: 美国允许伊朗再次出售石油作为结束战争协议的一部分
summary: The US is letting Iran sell oil and fuels again as part of an agreement reached to try and end the war. Amos Hochstein, TWG Global managing partner and former to energy advisor to President Joe Biden, says President Donald Trump has given Iran a political win. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Selloff in Korea Continues in US Trading
title_cn: 美国交易中韩国科技股继续遭遇抛售
summary: A global rout in tech stocks began in Asia where a selloff in Korean chipmakers stoked concerns about the sustainability of the artificial-intelligence driven rally. Bloomberg's Carmen Reinicke reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Eli Lilly Became a $1 Trillion Company
title_cn: 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 如何成为价值 1 万亿美元的公司
summary: Mounjaro and Zepbound turned Eli Lilly into a trillion-dollar pharmaceutical giant. But every blockbuster drug eventually faces competition. Here’s what Lilly is doing to stay on top. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI is Most Transformative Technology of our Times Says Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会前主席加里·詹斯勒 (Gary Gensler) 表示，人工智能是我们这个时代最具变革性的技术
summary:
Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler says AI leaders and hyperscalers need to generate meaningful revenue and productivity gains to meet current market conditions. 
He spoke with Paul Sweeney and Tom Keene on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Puts Curbs on Human-Rights Suits in Cisco Win
title_cn: 最高法院在思科胜诉中限制人权诉讼
summary: A divided US Supreme Court put new limits on lawsuits against companies over atrocities abroad, rejecting a suit accusing Cisco Systems Inc. of complicity in China’s torture of Falun Gong adherents.

title: MGX’s $50 Billion Raise Sets Up One of the Biggest AI Funds Ever
title_cn: MGX 筹集 500 亿美元，设立有史以来最大的人工智能基金之一
summary: Abu Dhabi’s MGX has raised close to $50 billion from regional and global investors to accelerate spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and technology, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Loses $600 Billion in Value Over Three Days
title_cn: SpaceX 三天内市值蒸发 6000 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares are looking to bounce back on Tuesday after a three-day selloff wiped off more than $600 billion from the Elon Musk-led rocket and satellite company’s market value. Shares are still up roughly 10% from its $135 initial public offering price. Pierre Ferragu of New Street Research says a cautious AI trade could be weighing on the stock. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Stocks Drive Indexes Lower as AI Rout Hits Global Markets
title_cn: 随着人工智能溃败袭击全球市场，科技股推动指数走低
summary: Technology stocks tumbled, dragging major indexes lower Tuesday, after a selloff in Korean chipmakers stoked concerns about the sustainability of the artificial-intelligence driven rally.

title: SpaceX Shares Waver Near $2 Trillion Mark After 3-Day Rout
title_cn: SpaceX 股价在连续 3 天暴跌后波动近 2 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares fluctuated at the open Tuesday, after a three-day selloff that wiped off more than $600 billion from the Elon Musk-led rocket and satellite company’s market value.

title: European Stocks Drop as Tech Rout Spreads; Puma Plummets 10%
title_cn: 科技股溃败蔓延，欧洲股市下跌；彪马暴跌 10%
summary: European stocks were swept up in a global tech selloff that began in South Korea and spread across equity markets.

title: Meta Debuts Glasses Under Its Own Brand at Lower $299 Price
title_cn: Meta 以 299 美元的低价推出自有品牌眼镜
summary: The company is also considering camera-free models in the future.

title: Games Industry Faces More Painful Months Ahead
title_cn: 游戏行业未来几个月将面临更多痛苦
summary: The world’s biggest games publisher is discussing axing some investments

title: Gracias’ Valor to Raise $2.5 Billion Fund Amid SpaceX Win
title_cn: Gracias’ Valor 将在 SpaceX 获胜之际筹集 25 亿美元资金
summary: Antonio Gracias’ Valor Equity Partners, a venture capital firm that’s long-been allied with Elon Musk, is raising about $2.5 billion to invest in startups and build on its success as a backer of the newly public SpaceX.

title: Julian Emanuel Remains Bullish as Tech Selloff Deepens
title_cn: 随着科技股抛售加深，朱利安·伊曼纽尔仍然看涨
summary: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore ISI, says earnings and price have simply caught up to each other in some of the Mag 7 stocks as he explains why he remains bullish amid a global tech selloff. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Getty Just Became an AI Company. It Now Has to Perform Like One
title_cn: 盖蒂刚刚成为一家人工智能公司。它现在必须表现得像一个
summary: The stock-image giant tried home-grown AI before its tie-up with OpenAI.

title: Masayoshi Son Dismisses Musk’s Orbital Data Centers Idea
title_cn: 孙正义驳斥了马斯克的轨道数据中心想法
summary: SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son predicted that the AI race will be clinched by computing resources on Earth as he said there’s little merit to building data centers in space, as championed by Elon Musk. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Slashed 21,000 in 12 Months as AI Replaces Some Roles
title_cn: AI 取代部分角色 Oracle 12 个月内裁员 21,000 人
summary: Oracle Corp. reduced its workforce by a wider scale than previously known, cutting 21,000 employees in the past 12 months. The reductions include jobs that were eliminated by the use of artificial intelligence. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BBVA Offloads AI Risk With $2 Billion Infrastructure-Linked SRT
title_cn: BBVA 通过 20 亿美元的基础设施相关 SRT 降低人工智能风险
summary: BBVA SA is close to completing a significant risk transfer to hedge some of its rapidly-expanding portfolio of artificial intelligence-related lending.

title: Google Taps Employee Alumni Network With AI Startup Incubator
title_cn: 谷歌通过人工智能初创企业孵化器利用员工校友网络
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is backing a new incubator for former employees building artificial intelligence startups, deepening its ties with one of Silicon Valley’s largest and most influential alumni groups.

title: The Growing Crisis for America's Child Abuse Investigators
title_cn: 美国虐待儿童调查人员面临的日益严重的危机
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated abuse material, police and investigators aren't getting the robust mental health support they need.

title: Stocks Hit by Tech Selloff as Korean Shares Plunge
title_cn: 韩国股市暴跌，科技股遭遇抛售
summary: A selloff in technology stocks is dragging global equities lower, led by a retreat in chipmakers that have been at the forefront of an unprecedented AI-driven rally, as Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why SpaceX Shares Are Under Pressure
title_cn: 为什么 SpaceX 的股价面临压力
summary: Less than two weeks after the year’s most hotly anticipated IPO, investors are questioning the remaining upside of a company that seeks to raise billions in investor-grade debt as the AI trade stalls and other major offerings from OpenAI and Anthropic loom. Bloomberg's Charlie Wells discusses on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU to Escalate Meta Probe Into Addictive Design That Hooks Kids
title_cn: 欧盟将对吸引儿童的成瘾设计升级元调查
summary: The European Union is set to ramp up an investigation into Meta Platforms Inc. that alleges its products are addictive to children, as the bloc increases regulatory pressure on the US social media company.

title: Allianz CIO Sees Markets Pricing 'Darwinian Effect of AI'
title_cn: 安联首席信息官认为市场定价是“人工智能的达尔文效应”
summary: Ludovic Subran, chief investment officer and chief economist at Allianz, discusses the outlook for technology stocks, inflation and central bank policy. He speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Fall 10% From Record
title_cn: 韩国股市较纪录下跌 10%
summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concern that the rally has become overstretched. The Kospi closed down 10%, with losses extending after a 20-minute trading suspension by the Korea Exchange. Bloomberg's Neil Campling has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prosus Develops OpenClaw Rival to Address Privacy Concerns
title_cn: Prosus 开发 OpenClaw 竞争对手来解决隐私问题
summary: Prosus NV has developed its own version of the artificial intelligence agent OpenClaw to get around European concerns over data privacy, and will start rolling it out this week.

title: Tech Selloff Hits Asia as Korea Stocks Slide | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/23/2026
title_cn: 韩国股市下滑，科技股遭遇抛售哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/23/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s Biggest Equity Fund Makes Contrarian IT Stocks Bet
title_cn: 印度最大的股票基金逆势押注 IT 股票
summary: India’s largest actively managed equity fund is betting against investor fears over artificial intelligence’s impact on the outsourcing industry as it snaps up the nation’s beaten-down IT stocks.

title: Trump Says Iran’s Unfrozen Funds to Remain Under US Control
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗未冻结资金仍处于美国控制之下
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran will only be able to use funds released from frozen accounts to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

title: NY’s Pension Chief Faces First Democratic Challengers Since 2007
title_cn: 纽约养老金局长自 2007 年以来首次面临民主党挑战者
summary: New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli, who oversees the state’s $300 billion pension fund, is facing his first primary challenge since taking office nearly two decades ago as two rival Democrats try to seize on the progressive energy that propelled Mayor Zohran Mamdani to victory in November.

title: Trump’s Rapid Deportation Rule Approved by Appeals Court for Now
title_cn: 特朗普的快速驱逐规则目前已获得上诉法院批准
summary: A divided federal appeals court lifted a temporary hold on a Trump administration policy that allows federal agents to rapidly remove undocumented immigrants without due process from anywhere in the US if they can’t quickly prove they’ve been in the country for more than two years.

title: Canada Backs $504 Million Loan for Indigenous Nuclear Stake
title_cn: 加拿大支持为本土核股权提供 5.04 亿美元贷款
summary: Canada will make a C$715 million ($504 million) loan guarantee to a group of seven First Nations so they can buy a stake in a large nuclear project east of Toronto.

title: US Sanctions Key Cuban Bank, Miner in Fresh Blow to Havana
title_cn: 美国制裁古巴主要银行和矿业公司对哈瓦那造成新打击
summary: The US sanctioned the Cuban military’s international banking arm and a state-run company that’s partnered with Trafigura Group and other miners, in the latest escalation of pressure against Havana’s communist leadership.

title: Starmer Plan on Defense Investment Sets Up Tension With Burnham
title_cn: 斯塔默国防投资计划与伯纳姆关系紧张
summary: Outgoing UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is pushing ahead with a controversial plan to increase defense spending, setting up potential tensions with the man most likely to succeed him, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham.

title: Meloni Considers Calling Italian Election as Soon as April
title_cn: 梅洛尼考虑最早在四月举行意大利大选
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni is weighing the possibility of holding Italy’s next general election as soon as April, months ahead of the legal deadline before the end of 2027, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Historical Tensions Mar Ukraine Recovery Push in Poland
title_cn: 历史紧张局势三月乌克兰复苏推动波兰
summary: Historical grievances are threatening to derail an annual Ukraine reconstruction conference in Poland and undermine ties with one of the war-torn country’s most important European allies.

title: Armenia to Attend Ukraine Forum as Russia Targets Its Exports
title_cn: 俄罗斯瞄准其出口，亚美尼亚将参加乌克兰论坛
summary: Armenia is sending a top security official to the Ukraine Recovery Conference, underscoring Yerevan’s tilt away from Russia as Moscow continues to step up economic pressure on its longtime ally.

title: Former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
title_cn: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
summary:
Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. He served as Fed chief for 18 years, from 1987 to 2006, and was credited with guiding a record US economic expansion, but his legacy was later dimmed by the financial crisis that erupted in 2008. Greenspan died on June 22 at his home due to complications of Parkinson's disease. Bloomberg's David Westin looks back at his accomplishments. 

Correct: This video has been edited and reuploaded to reflect that Alan Greenspan left the Fed 20 years ago. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Is Giving Away Too Much to Iran With MOU, Hochstein Says
title_cn: 霍赫斯坦表示，特朗普通过谅解备忘录向伊朗做出了太多让步
summary: Amos Hochstein, TWG Global managing partner and former to energy advisor to President Joe Biden, says President Donald Trump has given Iran a "huge political win" and the memorandum of understanding it signed with the US is "like a surrender." He also talks about Iranian oil hitting the market again on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Oil Exports Hit 2026 High as Iran Waiver Threatens Sales
title_cn: 由于伊朗豁免威胁销售，俄罗斯石油出口创 2026 年新高
summary: Tumbling oil prices after the interim US-Iran peace deal are eating into Moscow’s windfall

title: Army Sets One-Year Deadline to Start Making Cheap Interceptors
title_cn: 陆军设定一年期限开始制造廉价拦截机
summary: US Army Secretary Dan Driscoll wants defense companies to develop cheaper air-defense interceptors within a year, part of a bid to upend decades of weapons-development inertia and fix shortcomings exposed by the wars in Ukraine and Iran.

title: Europe Has $200 Billion Treasury Leverage Over US, Study Argues
title_cn: 研究称，欧洲的国债杠杆超过美国 2000 亿美元
summary: Europe’s outsized holdings of US Treasuries give it significant sway in any future standoff with President Donald Trump, according to new research.

title: Merz Backs Pension Plan That Channels €30 Billion to Markets
title_cn: 默茨支持向市场输送 300 亿欧元的养老金计划
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Germany will consider a new mandatory pension contribution that would funnel at least €30 billion ($34.2 billion) a year into a capital-market fund as part of a broad effort to shore up the country’s retirement system.

title: Former BOE Rate-Setter Haskel Named Chair of UK Fiscal Watchdog
title_cn: 英国央行前利率制定者哈斯克尔被任命为英国财政监督机构主席
summary: The UK government has chosen former Bank of England rate-setter Jonathan Haskel as the new chair of its fiscal watchdog, the Office for Budget Responsibility.

title: Why Anti-Migrant Attacks Are Flaring in South Africa
title_cn: 为什么反移民袭击在南非愈演愈烈
summary: South Africa has seen a wave of xenophobic attacks and demonstrations against the presence of undocumented migrants in recent months. There are mounting concerns that the violence could escalate, particularly as protesters demand that these foreign nationals leave the country by June 30.

title: Burnham to Flesh Out Economic Plan as Chancellor Pick Looms
title_cn: 伯纳姆将在财政大臣人选临近之际充实经济计划
summary: Andy Burnham is under pressure to outline an economic plan for the UK following his sudden and spectacular rise toward the pinnacle of British politics.

title: Romania in Last-Ditch Push to Form Cabinet After Vote Fails
title_cn: 投票失败后罗马尼亚正在最后努力组建内阁
summary: The Romanian president will make a final push for a pro-European Union government after his candidate failed to win a vote of confidence, prolonging a political deadlock that is stalling key reforms for crucial EU funding.

title: Eskom CEO Says Grid Asset Separation Requires Sustainability
title_cn: Eskom首席执行官表示电网资产分离需要可持续性
summary: The head of South Africa’s state power utility Eskom Holdings SOC Ltd. said a government plan to spin off its transmission assets needs to be implemented in way that is sustainable for the company.

title: Andy Burnham Needs Bold Ideas Says Ex-BOE Governor King
title_cn: 前英国央行行长金表示安迪·伯纳姆需要大胆的想法
summary: Andy Burnham is under pressure to outline an economic plan for the UK following his sudden and spectacular rise toward the pinnacle of British politics. Bloomberg understands the Labour leadership hopeful will give a set-piece speech on the economy next week as he seeks to lay out his stall ahead of that contest. Former Bank of England Governor Mervyn King was asked by Caroline Hepker and Lizzy Burden how the potential next Prime Minister should be thinking about the economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: German Funds Industry Backs Merz’s €30 Billion Pension Overhaul
title_cn: 德国基金业支持默茨 300 亿欧元的养老金改革
summary: Germany’s fund industry welcomed plans by Chancellor Friedrich Merz for a reform of the retirement system that would require employees to invest part of their income in capital markets.

title: Mamdani’s Effort to Shape Democratic Politics Gets Its First Test
title_cn: 马姆达尼塑造民主政治的努力首次受到考验
summary: In today’s NY primaries, the mayor seeks to unseat some incumbents

title: Spain’s Sanchez Holds Firm as Graft Cases Reach His Family
title_cn: 西班牙桑切斯家人面临贪污案，但他态度坚定
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez remains unyielding against the growing pile of corruption charges that have reached his household — and are increasing the political risks for his Socialist Party heading into an election year.

title: Kushner Resort-Inspired ‘Hysteria’ Dismissed by Albanian Leader
title_cn: 库什纳度假村引发的“歇斯底里”被阿尔巴尼亚领导人驳回
summary: Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama said that his government won’t withdraw its support for two luxury resort projects backed by Jared Kushner’s investment company despite weeks of daily protests against them.

title: A Poisoned Chalice Awaits the Next Leader of the UK
title_cn: 有毒的圣杯等待着英国的下一任领导人
summary: Andy Burnham would need more than quick wits to last longer than his predecessors.

title: Turkish Officials Expect Syrian Leader Visit Around NATO Summit
title_cn: 土耳其官员期待叙利亚领导人在北约峰会期间访问
summary: Turkish officials expect Syria’s president to visit Ankara around the time Turkey is hosting a NATO summit there next month, according to people familiar with the matter.
